The Ojai runs on Waymo’s sixth-generation Driver system and is built on a platform manufactured by Zeekr, the electric vehicle brand owned by China’s Geely, the same conglomerate that […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Oura’s Ring 5 is 40% smaller than its predecessor, and it arrives three days before a likely IPO filing https://thenextweb.com/news/oura-ring-5-smallest-smart-ring-health-wearable Thu, 28 May 2026 17:57:30 +0000 TheNextWeb=0a0c13074824cbf5a1c3fab9f67d9357 Oura has launched the Ring 5, a smart ring that is 40% smaller than its predecessor and, at 6.09mm wide and 2.29mm thick, is the smallest smart ring on the market. The ring weighs as little as 2 grams depending on size, down from the Ring 4’s 7.99mm width and 2.88mm thickness. Despite the shrinkage, […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> The hybrid model: why the smartest finance teams aren’t going all-in on AI https://thenextweb.com/news/hybrid-model-smartest-finance-teams-ai Thu, 28 May 2026 17:38:46 +0000 TheNextWeb=2835e8a68be5daab66d9385f24b549d7 Every finance vendor with a pulse has slapped “AI-powered” on their homepage in the last 18 months. They’re calling forecasting “modeling,” trend extension “intelligence,” and pattern matching “reasoning.” The terms get blurred on purpose because the blur sells.
